query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A black and white profile portrait of a person with short hair, their face turned downward and to the left, with one hand partially visible near the neck and shoulder area, against a plain dark background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white profile portrait rendered with deliberate soft focus blur, showing a person with short hair, their face turned downward and to the left in a contemplative pose, with one hand partially visible near the neck, against a plain dark background. The image features muted, faded tones with low contrast that creates an oppressive, melancholic atmosphere, where crushed midtones and weak separation between light and dark produce a heavy, suffocating mood throughout the frame.
